summary: Forward chain p_step proof not achievable without axiom - structural asymmetry between successor and predecessor seed constructions cannot be bridged by temp_a/discreteness

metadata.blocking_reason: The p_step property for forward chain cannot be proven from existing axioms. The successor seed construction lacks past-direction content (pastDeferralDisjunctions) that the predecessor seed has. The discreteness axiom gives F(H(not phi)) but we need G(H(not phi)) to propagate through Succ. No axiom-free path exists.

verification.notes: Task blocked before implementation - no build verification needed

review_reason: Task blocked: proof requires new axiom which is prohibited by plan constraints
